name: @reka/bench
description: Reka code-QA / retrieval benchmark harness (recall@k, MRR, answer-contains, token cost)
comment: Run from the rag-api directory so the shared node_modules (ts-node, vitest, @types/node) resolve. Examples: `npx ts-node --transpile-only rag-api/bench/runner.ts rag-api/bench/datasets/sample.json` or `cd rag-api/bench && npm run bench -- datasets/sample.json`.
